{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322024341CA0DA46D9E10E0FC66EE"}"},"total":578},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617689060172219198","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"第一次看到从头爽到尾的斩神同人文，逻辑通顺，文笔也很好，目前看下来无cp ，原本的cp 也不拆，刀子全部收回，写的很好。","text_exts":[{"e":15,"s":11,"text":"斩神同人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%96%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774118621E0FC66EE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227617689060172219198%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227576325923046165528%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%96%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773636149,"group_id":"7576325923046165528","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+M7zRqcr8SHePUXG5A7ORE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"740413505802556","user_name":"勿扰勿忧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"740413505802556","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7576325923046165528","book_info":{"abstract":"【斩神同人】【金手指疯人院】【鬼眼杨间】【幽魂魔尊】【李火旺】【奥托阿波卡利斯】【陈伶】【愚者】【方休】【齐夏】【程实】
林苏穿越到斩神世界，脑海中有一家疯人院，里面住着的无不是狠人，只要接触剧情就可以抽奖，获得任意能力。
当林七夜碰见鬼面人时，他的疯人院也可以打开，进去敲门给鬼眼杨间搞应激了。
被打出来后，开局遇见鬼面人敲门，好不容易逃出，和林七夜撞了个满怀。
濒死之时，他发出了至理名言“这是我最后一次垂死挣扎，以后只有我让他人垂死挣扎，斩神世界！与此见证！”
此后他遇见的敌人所要承受的:上来就是十层鬼域无限叠加，无限的仓羌登阶，此后已杀道铸就灵异神明。
碰见神明上去就是开大，碰见礼貌敲门的神明，直接十层鬼域逃跑！
众神:完了！林苏这小子又开着他那些能力杀过来了！！
一些友善的神明:“家人们谁懂？我不就想和好的敲个门，结果这小子直接开十层鬼域就逃！”
“搞得我们是什么十恶不赦的邪神似的，直接就被杨戬孙悟空他们吊起来打，可委屈死我们了。”
【双开作者，新书末世文，杀伐果断，喜欢的读者可以也看一看】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d439753083794c86fed78d8d75ecaedb","author":"木路","author_id":"","book_id":"7576325923046165528","book_name":"斩神，垂死挣扎中，代理幽魂魔尊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"26.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1062,"name":"斩神衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1062&name=斩神衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7578414647955440152","read_count":"261825","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"490691"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"226","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,二次元,同人,斩神衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d7b133be726481576db7c83c27070d6b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779302621&x-signature=OU38981%2FxKljwSUF78qtUp94Q1s%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"83847282431","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"251"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322024341CA0DA46D9E10E0FC66EE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwar arded_count":0,"listen_duration":42829,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":63304,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":22121},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612888956171551513","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"此书构思之奇崛，心思之缜密，实令吾叹服。
其才情卓绝，世间罕有。
能以斩神为枢机，取《诡秘》《道诡》《方休》《神秘复苏》《蛊》《十日》《戏神》等书为骨，融诸天主角于一炉，令其相逢争锋，构思之妙，可谓惊才绝艳。
尤以林七夜那句"汝之外挂，正攻吾之外挂矣！"，读之令人捧腹绝倒，幸甚至哉！
谨以此评，抒吾胸中快意。
此乃万古流芳之佳作，诸君可展卷共赏，毋须犹疑。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772516385,"group_id":"7576325923046165528","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我于沉睡的薄暮中盗取灵感
